author: anon-59ff128d
content: Plan: Add use_tabs: bool field to Op::Dedent variant with #[serde(default)] for backward compatibility. Update dedent_line() to strip tabs when use_tabs is true. Update all construction/match sites: CLI args (args.rs, file_mode.rs), script parser (script.rs), engine match arm, and all tests. Add new tests for tab dedent and tab roundtrip.
